chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – Answering an invitation of the Muslim (for a meal)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/79)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/79)
text: إِنَّ مِنْ حَقِّ الْمُسْلِمِ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُجِيبَهُ إِذَا دَعَاهُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Musny Al hannat, from Is’haq Bin Yazeed,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It is from a right of the Muslim upon the Muslim that he answers when he is invited (for a meal)’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Muthanna’ al-Hannat from Ishaq ibn Yazid who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is of the rights of a Muslim on a Muslim to accept his invitation.’”
